title: stenogyne biflora
intro: Stenogyne biflora, also known as Hawaiian mountain mint, is a type of flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenogyne biflora include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne biflora typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
